titleStmt.title: SII 39.50: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 50. (A.R. No. 50 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1423 (1501 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers a sale of land named as Vāsagapparayan of Kuḍikāḍu as Tirunāmattukkāni to the temple of Tirukkōlakkuḍi-Āṇḍa-Nāyaṉār by the Maravas of Vēlānguḍi in Pūṅgunra-nāḍu in order to pay the taxes due by them on their holdings.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakāttam- 1000 4 100 2 10 3- ṉ mel cellā
niṉṟa tuṉmati varuṣam puraṭṭāti mātam 2 10 § puṟamalai
nāṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷak
kuṭi Āṇṭa nāyiṉār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku pūṅku
ṉṟa nāṭṭu velaṅkuṭi maṟavaril teṟṟuvār kaṇṭan caṅkaraṉ
Uṭpaṭṭārum vicaiyātevaṉ Ariyavaṉ Uḷpaṭṭārumom
tirunāmattukkāṇi vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta
paricāvatu kaṉṉāṭakavarṇamumāy Iṟaikaramum yitukku
Iṟukkumpaṭikku Oru pokkum Illāta paṭiyāle Eṅ
kaḷ Ūrār kaiyyil nāṅkaḷ muṉṉāḷ koṇṭuṭaiya Ucita
vācakap paraiyaṉ kuṭikkāṭu viṟka koḷvāruḷaro Eṉ
ṟu palakālum nāṅkaḷ kūṟukaiyil Iṉṉāyaṉār Āticaṇ
ṭeśvara tevar velaṅkuṭi Ūrār kaiyil muṉṉāḷ tiru
nāmattukkāṇiyāka koṇṭatu Eṉṟu Ikkuṭik kāṭṭu
kku Ellaiyum puṟavum Okku Oru col vācakaraiyaṉ kuṭikkā
ṉeṉṟu kalveṭṭuk kāṭṭukaiyil nāṅkaḷ neṭunāḷatu Ippaṭikku
muṟṟavaṉārkku tāṅkācum Iṟuttuk paṟṟi Aṉupavittu
varukaiyiṉālum Ikkuṭikāṭṭukku Eṅkaḷ kaiyile cātaṉa
m Iruntu kāṭṭukaiyiṉālum paṟṟāḷaṉaittaḷḷa Oṇṇāteṉṟu
Iṉṉāyaṉār tirukkoḷakkuṭi yāṇṭa nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku
ḷavum Emmilicaintu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟap paṟṟikkoṇṭu
Oḻukalum puravilum I Ik kuṭikāṭṭukku U
ṇṭāṉa Iṟaikaram Ūḻiyam pāḻiyam Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāṅkaḷe miṟu
ttup potumpaṭiyāka Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Iṟaiyili tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka can
tirātittavaṟ cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭut
tom tirukkoḷakkuṭi Āṇṭa nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭe
śvaratevaṟku teṟṟuvār kaṇṭaṉ caṅkaraṉ Uḷpaṭṭārum vicai
yātevaṉ yavaṉ Uḷpaṭṭārumom Ippaṭikku nayi
ṉāṉ Aracukku vāyttāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
tiruvicaiyātevaṉ Āriyavaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku teṟṟuvārkaṇṭaṉ caṅkaraṉ Uḷḷi
ṭṭār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku caṅkaraṉ virapāṇṭiya
tevaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku civalla teva
ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ippiṟamāṉam Eḻu
taṉmaikku velaṅkuṭi kaṇakku Ilaimai Oḻukiya
Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
